name: io.github.Rocketech-Software-Development/formacv
description: Official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for FormaCV — drive AI-powered CV formatting, anonymization, AI tailoring, and ATS push-back from Claude Desktop, Cursor, and your own AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: FORMACV_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer credential issued by FormaCV after onboarding. Use 'demo' against demo URLs.

environmentVariables.name: FORMACV_SERVER_URL
environmentVariables.description: HTTPS origin of your isolated FormaCV deployment (e.g. https://demo.formacv.ai for demo mode).
